title: Derive parent identity enforcing no-double-counting rules
description: The no-double-counting constraints C1-C10 require a parent identity explaining why rho sources only A, why trace shifts kappa_min without radiating, why TT stress sources only TT radiation, why currents split cleanly, why boundary smoothing preserves exterior mass, and why Sigma_creation=0 in ordinary closed gravity. Without this, they are safety constraints, not derivations.
